device_name: Avenda Health AI Prostate Cancer Planning Software
intended_use: The Avenda Health AI Prostate Cancer Planning Software is an artificial intelligence (AI)-based decision support software, indicated as an adjunct to the review of magnetic resonance (MR) prostate ima
intended_use_full: The Avenda Health AI Prostate Cancer Planning Software is an artificial intelligence (AI)-based decision support software, indicated as an adjunct to the review of magnetic resonance (MR) prostate images and biopsy findings in the prostate oncological workflow. The Avenda Health AI Prostate Cancer Planning Software is designed to support the prostate oncological workflow by helping the user with the segmentation of MR image features, including the prostate; in the evaluation, quantification, and documentation of lesions; and in pre-planning for diagnostic and interventional procedures such as biopsy and/or soft tissue ablation.
target_condition: Clinically significant prostate cancer (csPCa), defined as Gleason Grade Group (GGG) ≥ 2
ground_truth: Whole mount pathology (3D surfaces and pathology labels from prostatectomy slides registered to preoperative T2-weighted MRI)
other_metrics: Complete csPCa encapsulation rate: 72.8% with proposed device vs. 1.6% with standard of care (SOC); balanced accuracy 84.7% vs. 67.2% (SOC) and 75.9% (hemi-gland contours); clinical quality assessment 99% of cases with proposed device vs. 60% with hemi-gland contours
